notableEvents.label: Adley Rutschman grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Adley Rutschman hits a grand slam (4) to left center field. Blaze Alexander scores. Gunnar Henderson scores. Taylor Ward scores.

notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson hits a grand slam (6) to left center field. Adley Rutschman scores. Pete Alonso scores. Dylan Beavers scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Coby Mayo. Isaac Paredes to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Coby Mayo. Isaac Paredes to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Gunnar Henderson flies out to left fielder Yordan Alvarez. Throwing error by left fielder Yordan Alvarez.

notableEvents.label: Jose Altuve reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Coby Mayo. Isaac Paredes to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Johnson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Johnson grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to shortstop Blaze Alexander to first baseman Pete Alonso. Christian Vázquez to 3rd. Carlos Correa out at 2nd. Daniel Johnson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Johnson rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Johnson grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to shortstop Blaze Alexander to first baseman Pete Alonso. Christian Vázquez to 3rd. Carlos Correa out at 2nd. Daniel Johnson out at 1st.
